svg.aria-label: The messages array at turn 21, with per-index token heat, before and after compaction.
svg.text: The messages array is where the context lives
Every model call sends the entire list. Slot height is drawn to token weight (~chars/4). Real 21-message run.
all 21 slots ride along on every subsequent call until compaction shrinks the prefix
Hot zones: messages[3], [6], [8], [9], [11], [19] hold most of the ~12k tokens. Compaction targets the prefix; the tail stays verbatim.
Summarization (not shown) replaces a large prefix with one handoff message when usage crosses 85% of budget.
